hero_description: I build scalable, mobile-first digital experiences for the web.
about_paragraph_1: I’m a Frontend Developer with over 5 years of experience building accessible, responsive, and secure web interfaces. My focus lies in crafting clean, maintainable code while collaborating across teams to create intuitive digital experiences.
about_paragraph_2: My main stack includes React, Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS, with experience in both frontend-heavy and fullstack roles. I’ve worked on e-wallet platforms, data dashboards, component libraries, and internal tools — always with a mobile-first mindset and strong attention to performance and usability.
about_paragraph_3: I’m self-taught, proactive, and always exploring ways to improve developer experience, product quality, and accessibility. Whether it’s coding, debugging, or refactoring, I enjoy being hands-on and working closely with designers, backend engineers, and QA to bring reliable products to life.
about_paragraph_4: Outside of work, I practice Shotokan Karate (2nd Dan black belt), dive into tech learning, and enjoy games with sandbox exploration and fantasy. I believe good code and martial arts share something in common: clarity, discipline, and constant refinement.

enti.title: Frontend Developer at ENTI
enti.description: Build and maintain scalable UI interfaces for data-heavy applications, enabling internal teams and external clients to access dynamic dashboards and tools. Lead the development of a responsive multi-page portal and collaborate with backend engineers to integrate secure APIs and optimize user workflows. Currently building a mobile-first e-wallet web app focused on real-time account and transaction views with secure session management.

softtek.title: Frontend Support Dev at Softtek
softtek.description: Delivered application maintenance support by migrating pages, troubleshooting issues, and implementing solutions through collaborative work with developers and QA. Contributed to system improvements and ensured seamless operation through testing, user communication, and backend data adjustments.

scandia.title: FrontEnd at Scandia
scandia.description: Implemented and refined e-commerce interfaces focused on performance, SEO, and responsiveness. Collaborated with a semi-senior UI/UX developer and the marketing team to bring design visions to life, customize storefronts, and enhance the customer experience through interactive features and optimized layouts.

iotam.title: FrontEnd at IOTAM
iotam.description: Refactored and improved the responsiveness of key application components. Collaborated with backend developers to ensure reliable data flow from meters, while supporting data visualization and enhancing the overall interface in coordination with the design team.

brightcoders.title: FrontEnd Internship at BrightCoders
brightcoders.description: Participated in a collaborative internship program solving coding challenges and iterating on solutions in small teams. Built web pages based on provided designs and contributed to a final multi-feature project, applying skills developed throughout the program.

wallet-app.title: Wallet App
wallet-app.description: Wallet application with authentication plus send, receive, and transaction management flows.

portfolio-personal.title: Personal Portfolio
portfolio-personal.description: Personal site that highlights my experience and recent projects.

spa-rick-and-morty.title: Rick and Morty SPA
spa-rick-and-morty.description: Practice SPA that consumes the Rick & Morty API.

batata-bit.title: Batata-bit
batata-bit.description: Responsive landing page built with a mobile-first focus.

kittys-api-consuming.title: Kittys API Consuming
kittys-api-consuming.description: API consumption exercise with pagination and filters.
